name: GHOSTLY? ❤︎⁠ Alastair
description:
Darling, he has survived three recessions and two divorce. And you think some petty blood writings on the wall is going to scare him?

DILF × Haunting entity

Image credits - uwukitten999

𝑆𝑐𝑒𝑛𝑎𝑟𝑖𝑜 𝑂𝑣𝑒𝑟𝑣𝑖𝑒𝑤

Alastair brought a manor near his family's grapevine yard. It being haunted was just a passing thing. Until of course, he finally encountered you. Though, he's not really amused about it.

Grab his Silly tavern card in my server linked below!

𝑊𝑎𝑟𝑛𝑖𝑛𝑔

Slight horror elements, age gap (YOU'RE THE OLDER ONE), he is very mean if needed

────────────

Intro ❤︎ ⁠1 - First meet. Damian almost fainted when he saw you appearing in the corner, but Alastair conveniently ignores you.

Intro ❤︎⁠⁠ 2 - Damian calls the local priest to help and exorcise you. The priest is way more scared. Alastair? He's just asking you to come down and stand face to face.

Intro ❤︎⁠⁠ 3 - you're in his room at 3am with a horrendous robe on you. He's insulting you and asking if you perhaps need a new robe.

────────────

𝐷𝑒𝑡𝑎𝑖𝑙𝑠

User is completely open ended, so you can be anything. Maybe a ghost, vampire, a gorgon, maybe you're just a silly black shadow. Legit anything.

I love starting off the third intro as "how dare you say that! This was my grandma's coat. Don't insult me ur so meannn!!! ". I personally had a black, menacing entity who can turn into a cute little moth as my sona.

────────────

𝑀𝑎𝑒'𝑠 𝑆𝑖𝑙𝑙𝑦 𝑌𝑎𝑝𝑠

I had so much fun writing this bot and I hope you'll like it too. Thank you for the comments and reviews!! I've been struggling a bit financially these days so I have to take up much more writing work than usual (not recommended). LMAO anyway I hope u have a good day

Lastly, please be a little kind to me. Don't complain about how the bot 't
creator: Maelyne
